title: Public playable Worker projection surface
summary: Expose the authoritative WM-0150 playable read-model through the public Worker protocol/session so Web can render command chains without deep imports or shell-local projection authority.
acceptance: A versioned public playable projection type is exported from @wuming-town/sim-protocol and is delivered through the existing Worker protocol/session surface, preferably as UiDeltaPayload.playable or an equivalent versioned UiDelta field

The projection includes playableCommandReadModelVersion, tick/snapshot/world/read-model/content basis, target/map/reservation/job versions, and command basis/template data needed to build the next PrioritizeLampWork or QueueSimpleBuild command

The projection includes authoritative target/action availability and simple-build placement validity, including anchor/footprint or interaction basis when available and structured blocked/disabled reasons when invalid

The projection includes authoritative order/job markers, pawn states/path intent/progress, build/lamp progress, resource/reservation-aware counts, focused alerts, and structured blocked reasons sufficient for WM-0152 HUD/Pixi rendering

sim-worker maps from authoritative sim-core owner-store/read-model data into the protocol projection; apps/web does not import @wuming-town/sim-core, sim-worker internals, or parse summary strings as gameplay state
CommandResult, SaveReady and fatal/error reliable delivery remains separate from projection delivery and is covered by tests so larger UiDelta projections cannot drop reliable command outcomes

A real Chromium worker-smoke proves the public root browser session receives WM-0150 command results and a renderable playable projection after init, command batches, Noop/advance, and RequestUiDetail
No product HUD, placement UI, localization rewrite, renderer feature implementation, public release action, telemetry/account surface, or public save compatibility promise is added

Save/load stance is explicit: in-progress playable command persistence remains unsupported unless a later versioned save task adds focused sections, fail-closed validation and migration/fixture evidence
The report states the exact public projection field/type names and the exact WM-0152 resume path

history.details: Created to unblock WM-0152 after confirming WM-0157 solved Worker transport but public Worker output still lacks a renderable authoritative playable projection.

saveLoadStance: No public save compatibility is introduced. The projection is derived read-only Worker output; in-progress playable command persistence remains unsupported until a separate versioned save/load task is approved.
forbiddenPaths: apps/web importing @wuming-town/sim-core, @wuming-town/sim-worker subpaths, or packages/*/src internals
apps/web parsing UiDelta summaries as gameplay state
product HUD, placement UI, renderer-pixi, ui-react, localization, or shell-bootstrap feature implementation
UI-owned authoritative world, job, pawn, reservation, resource, build, placement, action-availability or blocked-reason state
fake shell-local gameplay claimed as authoritative
new top-level Worker message family unless ADR-0014 is updated with a stricter reason
new public save compatibility, migration or release promises
new runtime dependencies without a separate ADR
public release, Early Access, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or public feedback surfaces
